summary: Completed comprehensive Phase III enterprise validation testing. Found critical backend infrastructure issues preventing enterprise deployment: PDF export system failing due to Unicode font issues, vault ledger system returning 500 errors due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization problems, and improper error handling returning 500 instead of proper HTTP status codes. Frontend integration working correctly but backend enterprise features require immediate fixes for production readiness.

critical_bugs.issue: PDF export system failing with Unicode font error - cannot render 🧬 characters
critical_bugs.impact: Complete failure of PDF export functionality - core Phase III feature
critical_bugs.error_details: Character "🧬" at index 0 in text is outside the range of characters supported by the font used: "helveticaB"

critical_bugs.issue: Vault ledger system returning 500 errors due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization
critical_bugs.impact: IP registry and audit trail system completely non-functional
critical_bugs.error_details: ObjectId object is not iterable - JSON serialization failure

critical_bugs.issue: Generation history endpoint failing with ObjectId serialization error
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot retrieve historical data - breaks audit trail functionality

critical_bugs.issue: Token creation endpoint timing out after 30 seconds
critical_bugs.impact: Pro Vault tier access system unreliable
critical_bugs.error_details: Request timeout - possible database connection or processing issue

error_handling_issues.issue: APIs returning 500 errors instead of proper HTTP status codes
error_handling_issues.impact: Poor enterprise error handling - should return 404 for not found, not 500

ui_bugs.issue: Generate button not properly disabled for empty sequences
ui_bugs.details: Button should be disabled when sequence is cleared

integration_issues.issue: Frontend handles backend 500 errors gracefully but user gets no feedback
integration_issues.details: Export button clicks but user doesn't see error message about backend failure

integration_issues.issue: No visual feedback when synthesis request completes
integration_issues.details: Button clicks but no alert or success message appears

passed_tests: Frontend page loading and form rendering
Analogue generation with valid sequences (3 analogues generated)
CRO synthesis request system (200 OK response with partner reference)
Hybrid compatibility - legacy sequence validation working
Hybrid compatibility - legacy analogue generation working
Frontend form validation showing error messages
Frontend results display with Vault IDs and enterprise features
Data consistency - Vault ID format validation (PMNC-XXXXXXX)
Data consistency - Vault ID uniqueness verification

success_percentage.frontend_integration: 85% (UI working but backend errors affect UX)

critical_fixes_required: Fix PDF export Unicode font issue - replace 🧬 characters with ASCII alternatives or use Unicode-compatible font
Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization in vault ledger and generation history endpoints
Implement proper HTTP status code handling (404 for not found, not 500)
Fix vault token creation timeout issue - investigate database connection
Add proper error handling and user feedback for frontend PDF export failures
enterprise_deployment_blockers: IP registry/audit trail system (vault ledger) completely non-functional
Poor error handling not suitable for enterprise deployment
action_item_for_main_agent.recommended_approach: Fix backend infrastructure issues first (ObjectId serialization, Unicode fonts, error handling) before proceeding with further enterprise feature development
